title: elymus macrourus var. pilosivaginatus
intro: Elymus macrourus var. pilosivaginatus, also known as the tall fescue grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Elymus macrourus var. pilosivaginatus typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the leaves and stems of the plant.
